_note: The campaign is just beginning. Notable items will be added here as they are acquired in play.

venturian-mask.name: Venturian Mask (Standard)
venturian-mask.description: Masks are a social institution in Venturia — worn on feast days, at the Autumn Masquerade, and as everyday fashion statements. A standard Venturian mask from the Masquers' Sodality is a finely crafted piece of painted leather or papier-mâché, but even common masks carry a slight... cooperative quality in the city air.
properties: Social: wearing a mask is expected and respected in Venturia
In Venturia specifically, genuine commitment to a masked identity may cause reality to become slightly more cooperative — the exact mechanism is unknown and unreliable
venturian-mask.source: Available from the Masquers' Sodality and market stalls throughout Venturia

archived-covenant.name: Archived Covenant (Covenant Archive Document)
archived-covenant.description: A contract witnessed and recorded by the Covenant Archive on specially prepared vellum that cannot be altered once the ink dries. In Venturia, where promises carry unusual weight, an Archived covenant is not merely a legal document. Nobody speaks openly about what happens to those who break them.
properties: Enhanced clauses available at higher cost that make oath-breaking inadvisable
The nature of the enforcement mechanism is not publicly discussed
